name: bim-viewport-3d
description: 3D model canvas host with chrome: navcube (aria-hidden), toolbar (role=toolbar), status bar (element label + coordinates), and canvas container. Workplace mounts xeokit-bim-viewer (AGPL-3.0); console shows SVG plan thumbnail or placeholder to preserve EUPL-1.2 license boundary. Touch: one-finger orbit, two-finger pan, pinch zoom.
html:
T N
IfcWall — WAL-EXT-001 X: 12.4 Y: 0.0 Z: 3.2
No IFC model loaded

variants.name: workplace
variants.description: xeokit-bim-viewer (AGPL-3.0) mounted in __canvas. Section plane create/edit, BCF viewpoint capture, IFC model swap enabled.

variants.name: console
variants.description: Static SVG plan thumbnail or placeholder — no xeokit dependency. Open question: see open_questions[0].

variants.name: placeholder
variants.description: Empty state before any IFC model is loaded — __placeholder visible.

aria: Container: <section aria-label='3D viewport'>. Canvas: role='img' aria-label='3D model view' (canvas is not natively accessible). Toolbar: role='toolbar' with individual <button aria-label>. Navcube: aria-hidden='true' (decorative).
license_note: Workplace 3D integration is AGPL-3.0 via xeokit coupling. Console path must avoid xeokit to preserve EUPL-1.2 boundary on app-console-bim.
open_questions: Console fallback: should the non-AGPL console surface render a static SVG plan thumbnail, a 2D CAD-style floor plan from IFC, or an empty placeholder? Decision affects whether the EUPL-1.2 license boundary holds for app-console-bim. Surface to Master for decision.
